data.name: Comixxx Desires
data.detailed_description:
More from Sinnera



關於此遊戲



Comixxx is a new special series from Sinnera featuring high quality, hot & sexy girls done in comic book style.

Comixxx Desires is a casual game with a relaxing atmosphere. Put your logic to the test to solve the puzzle and reveal the girls! Enjoy the classic puzzle piece swapping gameplay. Earn all the stars to beat record scores and unlock achievements & bonus level.

  • 15 challenging levels
  • Uncensored content
  • Beat the record times to earn stars
  • Unlock a bonus level after getting all the stars
  • Comic book style art
  • Atmospheric music
  • 32 achievements
  • Display girls from the gallery
  • Easily skip levels - unlock girls if you can't beat a level for more than 10 mins

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 and above
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD 4600 or equivalent (1 GB VRAM)
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX Compatible Sound Card
  • 備註: Mouse, Keyboard
